name: Doubler
description: Improves the chance to double click the donut

name: Homesick
description: Improves the chance for the donut to not move far when clicked

name: Clicker Storm
description: Every 100 clicks, causes a storm of mice to click the donut

name: Clicker League
description: Decreases the clicks needed to activate the storm

name: Donut Ninja
description: Instead of clicking, you only have to hold down the mouse button

name: Razor Sharp Mouse
description: You slice the donut by simply hovering it, no clicking required

name: Tripler
description: Adds a chance to triple click as opposed to double

name: Stoned Nut
description: Adds a chance for the donut to not move at all

name: Roll the Dice
description: You slice the donut by simply hovering it, no clicking required

name: Dice Bag
description: You slice the donut by simply hovering it, no clicking required

name: Die Mice
description: You slice the donut by simply hovering it, no clicking required
